publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-06-27 18:28:49 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Drawings, illustrations, and paintings; charcoal landscape drawings; exhibition catalogs and reviews; bound volumes of sketches, notebooks and pamphlets. Also, "Unheralded Artist: Alison Kingsbury," Princeton University undergraduate thesis by Holly Markovitz, 2000.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Alison Mason Kingsbury was an artist in Ithaca, N.Y. She came to Ithaca in 1926 as a student assistant to Ezra Winter, who designed the mural in the lobby of Willard Straight Hall, Cornell University. She married Morris Bishop, a noted Cornell writer and historian.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Drawings, illustrations, and paintings; charcoal landscape drawings; exhibition catalogs and reviews; bound volumes of sketches, notebooks and pamphlets. Also, "Unheralded Artist: Alison Kingsbury," Princeton University undergraduate thesis by Holly Markovitz, 2000.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: See also Alison Mason Kingsbury Gannett Clinic mural materials, #43-32-1193, Alison Jolly Papers, #8517, and Morris Bishop Papers, #14-18-641. A video of Kingsbury is availible in the Cornell Artists and Local Video Programs collection, #3867.

emph.ref: Series II. Papers and Family Documents

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Alison Mason Kingsbury papers, #3663. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Letters to Katherine KK Chase, from Alison Mason Kingsbury and MGB, and obits
Publicity correspondence and samples of early struggles with an uninformed community
Letters from Alison Mason Kingsbury to her mother
letters to Alison Mason Kingsbury relating to Stanton family

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 12 letters (in large yellow envelope)from Stanton family members to Alison Mason Kingsbury includes one copy of a portrait of a family member

did.unittitle: Series II. Papers and Family Documents
"Emotional Eyesight: an Opinion on Art" manuscript by Alison Mason Kingsbury
Plate descriptions, comments, and condensed version of "Emotional Eyesight"
"Question of Taste" paper bound, two parts
"A Question of Taste" letter and summary

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: AMK, Jillian Piccirilli, Documents include catalogues and newspaper cuttings

did.unittitle: Alison Mason Kingsbury documents on family history
Notes mainly related to Alison Mason Kingsbury family history
"Unheralded Artist: Alison Kingsbury", by Holly Markovitz
Catalogues of one man shows and group exhibitions
Memorial service for Alison Mason Kingsbury

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Detail of Alison Mason Kingsbury's memorial service at First Presbyterian Church, Ithaca, New York

did.unittitle: 7 pages torn out from The New Yorker
Mrs Morris Gilbert Bishop written on small brass plate
A Question of Taste', 'Play', 'Figures and Legends'
Newspaper cutting of the five Kingsbury daughters
Discharge papers, marriage certificate and two Alison Mason Kingsbury passports

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: US discharge certificate (1919), Morris Bishop and Alison Mason Kingsbury's marriage certificate and two US passports for Alison Mason Kingsbury

did.unittitle: Gannett Medical Clinic Lobby mural, press release
draft of speech by Alison Mason Kingsbury on friendship

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: speech about friendship between Morris Bishop and Vladimir and Vera Nabokov at Cornell

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: several poems and letters in large white envelope

did.unittitle: Memorial service contents for Alison Mason Kingsbury

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: April 23 1988, at First Presbyterian Church, Ithaca, NY

did.unittitle: Appraisal of Alison Mason Kingsbury's estate

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Alison Mason Kingsbury to Ithaca Trust Company, as trustee

did.unittitle: Alison Mason Kingsbury's oil paints in silver box
Slides, negatives, and photographs of Alison Mason Kingsbury paintings, taken by Tony de Camillo
Two architectural drawings of The George House, Ithaca
Louis Fuertes sketch of a weasel lying down
Drawings for Paramount Poems and Spilt Milk

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: several pencil drawings, includes note to MJ from AJ

did.unittitle: Drawings for Love Rimes of Petrarch, and Letters for Petrarch
original art works by Alison Mason Kingsbury
Alison Mason Kingsbury and MMK drawings
Original drawings for A Renaissance Story Book, A Classical Story Book, A Romantic Story Book, and more
7 photos of the Huntington Club Cornell
Mother and Alison Mason Kingsbury as a baby photos
photo of Margaretta, Alison Mason Kingsbury and little Alison
photos and letter re: class of 1936 women's reunion at Cornell
Kingsbury and Mason photos and portraits, including Gilbert Stuart

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes college and early Ithaca/Cornell prints cyanotype prints

did.unittitle: Alison Mason Kingsbury's Greek Photos, in album
Color photographs of Alison Mason Kingsbury paintings and scenery, from Holly Markovitz
Baby photos of Alison Mason Kingsbury and mother
Large photo of Alison Mason Kingsbury and others
Photographs of paintings, negatives for drawings in "A History of Cornell"
Framed portraits of "Grandfather and Grandmother Knox"
Three small photographs, two of children one of Alison Mason Kingsbury
Alison Mason Kingsbury and Morris Bishop's wedding photos

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 7 portrait photos of Alison Mason Kingsbury

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: photos in envelope, friends to Alison Mason Kingsbury
